verification_rules.command_parameters: Internal Audit or Compliance Officer to conduct a structured walkthrough of the 'Regulatory Compliance Obligation' control implementation. Inspect documentation, interview relevant staff, and observe process execution. Do NOT rely solely on the implementing department's assertions.
verification_rules.expected_result: Evidence of implementation consistent with the control objective. Documentary proof of obligation fulfilment. No contradictory evidence found during walkthrough.
verification_rules.reasoning: No deterministic machine-executable command is available for this 'Operational' control. A structured manual inspection by an independent reviewer (Internal Audit or Compliance Officer) provides the best independent verification outside the implementing department.

verification_rules.command_parameters: Access payment switch or gateway logs via SIEM or application logging system. Filter for transaction failure and exception events.
verification_rules.expected_result: No unauthorised payment transactions. Success/failure ratios within threshold. All declined transactions appropriately logged and investigated.
verification_rules.reasoning: Payment system logs are independently accessible via the SIEM or log management platform without requiring the payments team to provide data.

verification_rules.command_parameters: Access the Board Secretariat or corporate secretarial records system. Retrieve Board and Risk Committee meeting minutes for the relevant period.
verification_rules.expected_result: Board has discussed and minuted relevant regulatory agenda items. Risk oversight Committee meeting held at prescribed frequency. Quorum requirements met.
verification_rules.reasoning: Board and committee governance is verifiable through minutes, which are maintained by the Company Secretary independently of the implementing department.

verification_rules.command_parameters: Query the Risk Management / ALM system for CRAR or LCR computation data. Cross-reference with RBI offsite returns.
verification_rules.expected_result: CRAR >= minimum prescribed by RBI (currently 9% + applicable buffers). LCR >= 100%. Returns submitted to RBI match internal computation.
verification_rules.reasoning: Capital and liquidity ratios are computed from core banking and risk system data. An independent reviewer can recompute ratios or query the risk system directly.

verification_rules.command_parameters: Access vendor management system or procurement register. Review all active outsourcing arrangements.
verification_rules.expected_result: All critical vendors have: current due diligence on file, signed agreements with RBI-compliant clauses, SLA monitoring in place, annual review completed, exit plan documented.
verification_rules.reasoning: Vendor risk compliance is verifiable through the vendor management register, which an independent reviewer can access. Contracts and due diligence reports exist as auditable documents.

verification_rules.command_parameters: Run on each server with Administrator privileges. Use Get-WinEvent for log retrieval.
verification_rules.expected_result: All critical audit categories enabled for both Success and Failure events. Event logs present in Security channel.
verification_rules.reasoning: Windows audit policy configuration is directly machine-readable. Log existence can be independently verified by querying the Security event log without asking the security team.

verification_rules.expected_result: Evidence of implementation consistent with the control objective. Documentary proof of prohibition fulfilment. No contradictory evidence found during walkthrough.
verification_rules.reasoning: No deterministic machine-executable command is available for this 'Preventive' control. A structured manual inspection by an independent reviewer (Internal Audit or Compliance Officer) provides the best independent verification outside the implementing department.

verification_rules.command_parameters: Query the Risk Management / ALM system for CRAR or LCR computation data. Cross-reference with RBI offsite returns.
verification_rules.expected_result: CRAR >= minimum prescribed by RBI (currently 9% + applicable buffers). LCR >= 100%. Returns submitted to RBI match internal computation.
verification_rules.reasoning: Capital and liquidity ratios are computed from core banking and risk system data. An independent reviewer can recompute ratios or query the risk system directly.

verification_rules.control_name: Enterprise Risk Management Control — Compliance Control
verification_rules.command_parameters: Run on each server with Administrator privileges. Use Get-WinEvent for log retrieval.
verification_rules.expected_result: All critical audit categories enabled for both Success and Failure events. Event logs present in Security channel.
verification_rules.reasoning: Windows audit policy configuration is directly machine-readable. Log existence can be independently verified by querying the Security event log without asking the security team.

verification_rules.command_parameters: Internal Audit or Compliance Officer to conduct a structured walkthrough of the 'Regulatory Prohibition Enforcement' control implementation. Inspect documentation, interview relevant staff, and observe process execution. Do NOT rely solely on the implementing department's assertions.
verification_rules.expected_result: Evidence of implementation consistent with the control objective. Documentary proof of prohibition fulfilment. No contradictory evidence found during walkthrough.
verification_rules.reasoning: No deterministic machine-executable command is available for this 'Preventive' control. A structured manual inspection by an independent reviewer (Internal Audit or Compliance Officer) provides the best independent verification outside the implementing department.

verification_rules.command_parameters: Access payment switch or gateway logs via SIEM or application logging system. Filter for transaction failure and exception events.
verification_rules.expected_result: No unauthorised payment transactions. Success/failure ratios within threshold. All declined transactions appropriately logged and investigated.
verification_rules.reasoning: Payment system logs are independently accessible via the SIEM or log management platform without requiring the payments team to provide data.

verification_rules.command_parameters: Access the Board Secretariat or corporate secretarial records system. Retrieve Board and Risk Committee meeting minutes for the relevant period.
verification_rules.expected_result: Board has discussed and minuted relevant regulatory agenda items. Risk oversight Committee meeting held at prescribed frequency. Quorum requirements met.
verification_rules.reasoning: Board and committee governance is verifiable through minutes, which are maintained by the Company Secretary independently of the implementing department.
